title: Add background music with play/pause toggle and music note indicator

requirements.text: In AppContext.tsx, implement background music using a module-level Audio variable (outside the component) so it is never recreated on re-renders or context re-mounts. On first provider mount, if the module-level audio variable is null: create new Audio('/assets/music/background.mp3'), set .loop = true, set .volume = 1.0, assign it to the module-level variable, attach an 'error' event listener that sets isMusicPlaying to false silently. Do NOT attempt autoplay — music starts paused. Expose isMusicPlaying (boolean, default false) and toggleMusic (calls audio.play() or audio.pause() based on current state, updates isMusicPlaying accordingly) via context. Wrap every single audio operation in try/catch that fails silently. The app must never crash regardless of whether the file exists or playback is blocked.
acceptanceCriteria: Audio object is created at module scope, not inside useState or on every render
Audio has loop = true and volume = 1.0
isMusicPlaying is false by default on first load (no autoplay)
toggleMusic() correctly plays or pauses the audio and updates isMusicPlaying state
An 'error' event listener silently sets isMusicPlaying to false on load failure
No crash occurs if the audio file is missing or blocked
Context exposes isMusicPlaying and toggleMusic to consumers

requirements.text: In AppShell.tsx, add a music toggle button that: (1) reads isMusicPlaying from AppContext via useContext, (2) calls toggleMusic from AppContext on click, (3) displays '♪' (filled music note) when isMusicPlaying is true and '🔇' (muted symbol) when isMusicPlaying is false, (4) applies a subtle CSS pink glow pulse animation (box-shadow pulsing from rgba(244,114,182,0.6) to transparent) only when isMusicPlaying is true, (5) if AppContext values are undefined, the button no-ops on click without crashing. Position the button in the top-right corner alongside the existing dark mode toggle.
acceptanceCriteria: Music toggle button is visible in the top-right corner of every page
Button shows '♪' when music is playing and '🔇' when paused
Clicking the button starts or stops the music
A pink glow pulse CSS animation is active on the button only while music is playing
Dark mode toggle and all other AppShell elements are unaffected
No crash if AppContext is missing or toggleMusic is undefined

requirements.text: Place a placeholder audio file note in the codebase: create the directory frontend/public/assets/music/ and add a README.md inside it instructing: 'Place your background music file here as background.mp3. This file is loaded by AppContext.tsx at /assets/music/background.mp3.' This ensures the directory exists in the build output and the path resolves correctly in ICP deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: Directory frontend/public/assets/music/ exists in the project
A README.md is present inside that directory explaining where to place background.mp3
The audio src path '/assets/music/background.mp3' resolves as a valid static asset URL in the ICP deployment environment when the file is present

constraints: Do not change the dark mode toggle or any other part of AppShell beyond adding the music toggle button
Do not attempt autoplay on mount — music must only play when the user clicks the toggle
All audio operations must be wrapped in try/catch and fail silently — the app must never crash
Do not modify immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Providing or generating the actual background.mp3 audio file
Changing any page content, animations, or navigation logic
